title: Press Release – Parish & Company
bodyHtml:
Parish & Company Press Release

Public Pension Review

Public Employee Pension System (PERS) Reform and Related Market Impacts

Portland , Ore., Pension plans are the equivalent of mutual savings plans in which rests the average participants life’s savings.  They have also become a critical part of the economy due to their capacity to direct investment assets to particular uses.

Read full report here

Parish & Company Press Release

Public Pension Review

Public Employee Pension System (PERS) Reform and Related Market Impacts

Portland , Ore., Pension plans are the equivalent of mutual savings plans in which rests the average participants life’s savings. They have also become a critical part of the economy due to their capacity to direct investment assets to particular uses.
